visual_qa.renderer: PyMuPDF raster inspection of Microsoft Word PDF
observations: All article pages render legibly; tables, charts, figures, links, and Cyrillic/Latin glyphs are visible.
Front matter contains mutually inconsistent stale conference metadata.
TOC page contains only its heading and the following page is blank.
Visible page numbering begins on PDF page 90 as printed page 1 instead of covering the journal continuously.
Section heading numbering and spacing are inconsistent because raw section labels are not normalized.
